AdTips.title: Tips to get the best results for your ad

items: Ad Title: Good example: "Furnished apartment for rent in Al Difa Road – Abu Dhabi, 2 bedrooms and a hall"
Photos: Photograph the property during the day, making sure to show the facade or main rooms, kitchen, and bathroom.
Details: Mention the type of property, area, number of rooms and bathrooms, building age, finishing condition, floor, and parking.
Location: Specify the area accurately, preferably mentioning the name of the complex or neighborhood.
Price: Specify if the price is negotiable or not.
Make sure to post photos of the car from the inside and outside.
Offer reasonable prices, and to determine car prices, you can check similar cars on the app.
Clean the car before taking photos.
Photos: Take clear photos from the front, back, sides, and inside.
Details: Mention the model, year of manufacture, mileage, car condition, number of accidents (if any), fuel type, and transmission type (automatic / manual).
Price: Specify if the price is final or negotiable. Offer reasonable prices, and to determine car prices, you can check similar cars on the app.
Additions: Does it have insurance? inspection? recently maintained? Do not hesitate to mention them.
Title: Good example: "Toyota Corolla 2017 - 170k km - in excellent condition - Dubai"
Make sure to post photos of the restaurant layout and menu if available.
Make sure to post photos of special dishes you have.
Try to clarify the restaurant seating and table distribution, and provide special offers on distinct items.
Use real photos of the items available in the offer, or the restaurants in general.
It is preferable to have photos with good lighting and from different angles.
Mention the restaurant type (fast food, seafood, grills, sweets), working hours, and delivery service.
If there is an ongoing offer or a specific meal (example: Ketchup included with delivery, phone number, and preferably mention WhatsApp for quick contact).
Make sure to mention the restaurant location, street, and any famous landmark.
Title: Write the job title clearly, example: "Cashier required for a restaurant in Sharjah".
Details: Specify the tasks (comprehensive), salary type (or mention it depends on the interview), required nationality or languages if any, qualifications, or experiences.
Contact: Add a WhatsApp number or an email for quick contact.
Location: Specify the area accurately.
Take photos from different angles, and focus on the real condition (and do not use photos from the internet).
Mention the product type, brand, condition (new, used), usage duration (if used), warranty period, and whether there is delivery.
Price: Clear and negotiable or not.
Ad Title: Good example: "Samsung 400 liters refrigerator - used in excellent condition - Dubai".
Photograph the work environment in a clean and attractive way.
Use photos for the results of beauty services (before/after).
Avoid using photos from the internet.
Write every service in detail: makeup - haircut - oil bath - henna engraving - pedicure and manicure - skin cleaning - keratin - and others.
Is the service available at the salon only, or can it be booked "at home"?
Add any seasonal discounts or packages (e.g.: "Full care package for 199 AED only").
Add the name of the worker or hairdresser and the nearest famous landmarks.
Ad Title: Good example: "Haircut in Abu Dhabi, 50 AED" or "Package of 10 services for 100 AED".
Specify delivery locations: inside the same city only, between cities, inside the country only, or international.
Mention the vehicle type: bike, small car, van, truck...
Is the delivery on the same day? In how many hours? Is there an urgent delivery service?
Is there a cash on delivery option? Are there any additional fees?
Do you transport household items? Restaurant orders? Documents? Furniture?...
Mention the availability of tracking or delivery confirmation, and a guarantee for the shipment safety.
Specify accurately what you offer: AC repair, electrical wiring, water heater installation, painting, dismantling, plumbing, etc.
Are you an individual technician? An integrated maintenance company?
Mention the estimated duration to complete each type of work.
Put examples on prices or just the checkup cost (if any).
Add photos of your previous projects or before/after the repair.
Do you receive orders around the clock? Emergencies? Specific appointments only?
Specify the areas you cover (e.g.: only Dubai - all Emirates - Ajman and Sharjah only...).
